parsed_output.justification: Brett claimed to be the Seer and identified Pete as the Robber, which Pete eventually confirmed. Dustin claimed to be the Drunk, and Katie, after initially claiming to be the Seer, admitted to being the Tanner. Since these four roles (Seer, Robber, Drunk, and Tanner) are all non-Werewolf roles and account for all four players, it is highly probable that no player is a Werewolf and the Werewolf cards are in the center.
